summary: Methanol toxicity leads to severe metabolic acidosis due to accumulation of toxic metabolites like formic acid and lactic acid but snowfield vision occurs with carbon monoxide exposure instead. Thus, option \( \boxed{\text{D}} \) stands out as false regarding methanol-specific effects.
